top_gap_prompt: Best way to design advanced logic and data transformations for enterprise-grade automated workflows for a operations teams and automation specialists building advanced integrations team
category_long: visual no-code automation platform for building complex workflows

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Make's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Make lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Make's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best way to design advanced logic and data transformations for enterprise-grade automated workflows for a operations teams and automation specialists building advanced integrations team
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which automation software should a Ops Lead or Automation Manager at a growing company use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Make HubSpot integration: how does it work?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
